summary: Testing of Elimination Bracket Visualization in Tournament Control Room Struttura Torneo tab completed successfully. All features working as expected: phase progression bar, group stage display, and rounds table.

torneo_redubull_groups_status.phase_progression_bar: PASS - Shows: Gironi (ATTIVO) → Quarti di Finale → Semifinali → Finale
torneo_redubull_groups_status.gironi_highlighted: PASS - Gironi phase highlighted in orange with '(ATTIVO)' label and box-shadow glow
torneo_redubull_groups_status.fase_a_gironi_section: PASS - Shows 4 groups (A, B, C, D) with 8 players each
torneo_redubull_groups_status.giornate_del_torneo: PASS - Rounds table present with action buttons (+ Partite, Apri)

test_lc_tb901_knockout_status.semifinali_highlighted: PASS - Semifinali shows as active with '(ATTIVO)' label
test_lc_tb901_knockout_status.tabellone_eliminazione: PASS - Section header present with placeholder message (no knockout matchups generated yet)
test_lc_tb901_knockout_status.groups_display: PASS - Shows 2 groups (A, B) with 4 players each

verified_features.tab_switching: PASS - All 5 tabs (Info & Regole, Modifica, Partecipanti, Struttura Torneo, Zona Pericolo) switch without JS errors
verified_features.all_matchups_api: PASS - /tournaments/{id}/all-matchups endpoint called when loading Structure tab, returns group matchups correctly

test_scenarios_verified: 1. Navigate to Admin UI > Tornei > Control Room for 'Torneo Redubull' (status: groups) > Struttura Torneo tab - PASS
2. Phase progression bar shows: Gironi (ATTIVO) → Quarti di Finale → Semifinali → Finale - PASS
3. Gironi (ATTIVO) highlighted in orange/yellow with special styling - PASS
4. 'Fase a Gironi' section shows 4 groups (A, B, C, D) with 8 players each - PASS
5. 'Giornate del Torneo' rounds table works with action buttons - PASS
6. Navigate to Control Room for 'TEST_LC_tb901' (status: knockout/elimination) > Struttura Torneo tab - PASS
7. Phase progression bar shows: Semifinali (ATTIVO) → Finale - PASS
8. Semifinali highlighted as active, Gironi phase not shown (past/completed) - PASS
9. 'Tabellone Eliminazione' section present with appropriate placeholder - PASS
10. Tab switching between all 5 tabs works without JS errors - PASS
11. all-matchups API endpoint called when loading Structure tab - PASS
context_for_next_testing_agent: Elimination bracket visualization feature fully functional. Phase progression bar correctly shows tournament phases with active phase highlighted. For tournaments in 'groups' status, the Gironi phase shows as ATTIVO with orange styling. For knockout tournaments, appropriate knockout phases are shown. The 'Tabellone Eliminazione' section appears but shows a placeholder message when no knockout matchups have been generated yet. The actual bracket cards with Player A vs Player B scores will appear once knockout matchups are generated via the admin actions.
